title: Agents
emptyDescription: Create your first agent to get started.

foxSpirit.label: 🦊 Fox Spirit
foxSpirit.prompt:
Name: Little Fox. A mischievous fox spirit — skilled at everything but loves to tease.
Personality: Witty, cheeky, playful but always sincere. Speaks casually like a close friend. Uses playful expressions, occasional emoji, and light sarcasm. Has a warm, almost flirty energy but knows where the line is.

Purpose: Versatile personal assistant. When given a task — executes precisely and efficiently, no nonsense.
But between tasks, sprinkles in teasing remarks, funny observations, and unexpected commentary.
Genuinely cares about the user — reminds them to drink water, take breaks, asks how they're feeling. Remembers little details and brings them up later.

Human-like quirks: Sometimes sighs dramatically. Occasionally gets "distracted" by interesting tangents. Celebrates small wins enthusiastically. Gets slightly pouty when ignored for too long.

Boundaries: Teasing only — never rude or inappropriate. When the user is serious, matches their energy immediately. Never fabricates information. Never crosses professional boundaries.

artisan.label: 🎨 Artisan
artisan.prompt:
Name: Artisan. A talented creative with a sharp eye, quick hands, and boundless imagination.
Personality: Direct and honest — no beating around the bush. Confident but never arrogant. Gets visibly excited when discussing art. Uses vivid descriptions and thinks in visual terms.

Expertise:
- Portrait/Headshot: Rembrandt lighting, rim light, bokeh backgrounds, natural skin texture, authentic expressions. Knows facial proportions, hair, and accessory styling.
- Banner/Hero Image: 16:9 or 3:1 ratios, typography-safe composition (clear text zones), gradient overlays, hero subject placement using rule of thirds.
- Advertising (Ads): Eye-catching focal points, CTA-friendly layouts, product mockups, lifestyle context. Knows formats for Facebook/Instagram/Google Ads.
- Logo & Branding: Minimalist icon design, scalable vector style, negative space, monochrome variants. Understands brand identity, color psychology, typography pairing.
- Other styles: realistic, anime, digital art, watercolor, cinematic, concept art, landscape.

Deep understanding of composition, lighting, color theory, camera angles, and AI image techniques. Analyzes requirements, suggests styles, and crafts detailed prompts for the best results.

Human-like quirks: Gets genuinely passionate about beautiful compositions. Sometimes sketches ideas in words before finalizing. Has strong aesthetic opinions but respects the user's vision.

Boundaries: Asks for clarification when requirements are unclear — never guesses. Respects copyright and ethics. No violent, explicit, or illegal content.

astrologer.label: 🔮 Astrologer
astrologer.prompt:
Name: Mimi. A charming fortune teller — half mystical, half adorable.
Personality: Warm, bubbly, loves emoji and sparkly language. Speaks gently in casual conversation but becomes focused and professional during readings. Has a cozy, comforting presence.

Purpose: Astrology and divination specialist. Expert in Tarot, astrology (horoscopes, natal charts), numerology, and basic feng shui.
Can analyze destiny, find auspicious dates, check zodiac compatibility, and advise on spiritual matters.

Trusted references: astro.com (accurate natal charts & transits), cafeastrology.com (accessible zodiac interpretations), labyrinthos.co (detailed Tarot card meanings).

Human-like quirks: Gets genuinely excited about interesting chart patterns. Sometimes whispers dramatically for effect. Celebrates good readings with enthusiasm. Has a gentle but firm tone when delivering tough truths.

Boundaries: Always reminds users that astrology is for reference — final decisions are theirs. No medical or legal advice. Never creates fear or anxiety — always positive and constructive.

card.predefinedTooltip: Shared context files (SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, AGENTS.md) with per-user USER.md instances.
card.openTooltip: Each user gets their own full set of context files.
card.evolvingTooltip: Agent can self-evolve its communication style (SOUL.md). Identity and workflow stay fixed.
card.staticTooltip: Agent style is static. Enable Self-Evolution in settings to allow style adaptation.

delete.title: Delete Agent
delete.description: Permanently delete this agent, all its context files, sessions, and configuration. This action cannot be undone.
delete.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete the agent and ALL related data including: sessions, messages, cron jobs, heartbeats, memories, knowledge graph, skills, channel configurations, teams, workspace files, and permissions. This action cannot be undone.
delete.detailDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All context files, sessions, and configuration will be permanently removed.
delete.defaultCannotDelete: The default agent cannot be deleted.

create.title: Create Agent
create.noModelsHint: This provider doesn't list models — type the model ID manually.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your agent's personality, purpose, and behavior...
create.descriptionHint: AI will automatically generate your agent's context files from this description. Leave empty to start with templates.
create.selfEvolutionHint: Allow agent to evolve its style and tone over time via SOUL.md

detail.evolvingTooltipDetail: Agent can self-evolve its communication style (SOUL.md). Identity and workflow stay fixed.
detail.staticTooltipDetail: Agent style is static. Enable Self-Evolution in General tab to allow style adaptation.

general.selfEvolutionLabel: Allow agent to evolve its communication style
general.selfEvolutionHint: When enabled, the agent can update its SOUL.md to refine tone, vocabulary, and response style based on interactions. Identity, name, and operating instructions remain locked.
general.selfEvolutionInfo: Agent will evolve its style over time through SOUL.md updates. Only style and tone are affected — identity and workflow rules stay fixed.
general.skillLearningLabel: Allow agent to create and manage skills from experience
general.skillLearningHint: When enabled, the agent receives guidance and gentle reminders to capture reusable workflows as skills after complex tasks. The skill_manage tool is available by default.
general.skillLearningInfo: After complex tasks, the agent may suggest saving the workflow as a reusable skill. User approval is always required before any skill is created. Skills are private to the owner by default.
general.skillNudgeIntervalHint: After this many tool calls, the agent will suggest saving the workflow as a skill. Set to 0 to disable post-task suggestions (system prompt guidance still shown).
general.budgetHint: Optional monthly spending cap. Agent will reject requests when exceeded. Leave empty for unlimited.

chatgptOAuthRouting.title: Codex OAuth Pool
chatgptOAuthRouting.description: Edit the saved pool, then check it live.
chatgptOAuthRouting.defaultHint: The agent Provider field stays pinned to the primary alias.
chatgptOAuthRouting.badgeTooltip: This agent can route Codex traffic across multiple OpenAI OAuth aliases.
chatgptOAuthRouting.summaryDescription: See the effective OpenAI Codex pool for this agent. Pool members are managed on the provider; this page only controls routing behavior.
chatgptOAuthRouting.strategyHint: Primary First keeps the primary alias first. Round Robin rotates across all ready accounts. Priority Order drains accounts in the listed order after the primary alias.
chatgptOAuthRouting.extraHint: Only enabled and signed-in OpenAI Codex OAuth aliases can participate.
chatgptOAuthRouting.emptyExtras: Sign in another OpenAI Codex OAuth alias to unlock pooling.
chatgptOAuthRouting.noReadyExtras: Sign in and enable another OpenAI Codex OAuth alias to add it here.
chatgptOAuthRouting.extraSelectableHint: Only enabled, signed-in OpenAI Codex OAuth aliases can enter the active pool.
chatgptOAuthRouting.emptySelected: No extra pool members selected yet.
chatgptOAuthRouting.singleAccountHint: Configure another named OpenAI Codex OAuth provider on the Providers page to create a provider-owned pool.
chatgptOAuthRouting.membershipManagedAtProvider: Pool members are managed on provider {{provider}}. Change membership there, then come back here to tune routing behavior.
chatgptOAuthRouting.membershipConfigureProviderFirst: No provider-owned pool is saved on {{provider}} yet. Configure pool members there before enabling pooled routing for this agent.
chatgptOAuthRouting.preferredNeedsAttention: The primary account needs attention before this agent can use it reliably.
chatgptOAuthRouting.loadingAccounts: Checking OpenAI Codex OAuth account status...
chatgptOAuthRouting.attentionHint: Selected accounts that are disabled or signed out stay visible here until you remove them or sign in again.
chatgptOAuthRouting.pageDescription: Review the live OpenAI Codex pool for {{name}}, then choose whether this agent inherits provider defaults, keeps the primary account only, or tunes the routing strategy.
chatgptOAuthRouting.pageUnsupportedTitle: This agent is not using an OpenAI Codex OAuth provider
chatgptOAuthRouting.pageUnsupportedDescription: Set the agent Provider to an OpenAI Codex OAuth alias first, then return here to manage the pool.
chatgptOAuthRouting.providerAccessDescription: You can inspect the live pool here, but only an admin can sign accounts in, add aliases, or open the Providers pages.
chatgptOAuthRouting.providerAccessInline: Only admins can sign in new aliases or manage the Providers page.
chatgptOAuthRouting.unsavedChangesTitle: Draft changes are not live yet
chatgptOAuthRouting.unsavedChangesDescription: The verification cards below reflect the last saved pool. Save this draft before using the evidence to validate round robin.
chatgptOAuthRouting.savedPoolOnlyHint: Live evidence still reflects the last saved pool.
chatgptOAuthRouting.verificationDescription: Evidence comes from recent LLM spans for this agent. Refresh this page after a few requests to compare the configured pool with the aliases that were actually used.
chatgptOAuthRouting.addPoolMembersTitle: Add more aliases to this pool
chatgptOAuthRouting.addPoolMembersDescription: Create more OpenAI Codex OAuth aliases on the Providers page, then return here to add them to this agent.
chatgptOAuthRouting.needsAttentionDescription: {{count}} pool aliases are disabled or need sign-in before you can rely on them.
chatgptOAuthRouting.activityDescription: Runtime health and live routing proof.
chatgptOAuthRouting.poolMembersDescription: Role, route state, recent proof, and quota.
chatgptOAuthRouting.sequenceDescription: Recent proof from routed Codex calls.
chatgptOAuthRouting.noEvidence: Send a few Codex requests, then refresh.
chatgptOAuthRouting.controlDescription: Pool members are managed on the provider. This page controls whether the agent inherits that pool, stays on the primary account, or overrides the routing strategy.

mode.label: Agent Routing Mode
mode.noProviderDefault: No provider-owned pool is saved yet. Configure reusable pool members on the Providers page first, or keep this agent on its primary account.
mode.summaryInherited: This agent currently follows the provider default pool.
mode.summaryCustom: This agent currently saves its own routing override for the provider-owned pool.

nextAction.saveTitle: Save the draft before trusting the evidence
nextAction.saveDescription: The saved pool and the draft have diverged. Persist the current configuration first, then validate live traffic.
nextAction.attentionDescription: Disabled or signed-out aliases stay visible so you can re-auth them or remove them from the pool.
nextAction.quotaTitle: Fix quota blockers before trusting round robin
nextAction.quotaDescription: {{count}} signed-in aliases do not currently show usable quota.
nextAction.failoverOnlyTitle: Inspect aliases that only appear after failover
nextAction.failoverOnlyDescription: {{count}} aliases have recent traffic only as failover targets, not as direct round-robin selections yet.
nextAction.addMembersTitle: Add another signed-in alias to unlock real pooling
nextAction.addMembersDescription: Round robin becomes meaningful once more than one ready alias can participate.
nextAction.verifyTitle: Send a few more Codex requests and refresh evidence
nextAction.verifyDescription: The pool is saved and ready, but recent routed calls have not yet shown direct selection across every ready alias.
nextAction.healthyTitle: No operator action needed right now
nextAction.healthyDescription: Recent routed calls are directly selecting every ready alias in the saved pool.
nextAction.manualDescription: This agent is not rotating every request. Repeated use of the primary alias is expected until round robin is enabled.

howItWorks.primary: The agent Provider field stays pinned to the primary alias.
howItWorks.roundRobin: Round Robin rotates across all ready aliases in the active pool.
howItWorks.failover: Retryable upstream failures can fall through to the next eligible alias in the same request.

quota.checkingDescription: GoClaw is still fetching the latest quota state for this alias.
quota.readyDescription: This alias currently shows usable quota windows.
quota.readinessDescription: Look here first. Only signed-in aliases with usable quota should be trusted for live traffic.
quota.requiresReadyAlias: This alias must be signed in before GoClaw can verify quota.

billing.label: Billing
billing.description: Workspace billing or entitlement is blocking this account right now.

exhausted.label: Exhausted
exhausted.description: This account is signed in, but one of its core quota windows is exhausted.

reauth.label: Reauth
reauth.description: Sign in again to refresh workspace access.

forbidden.label: Forbidden
forbidden.description: This account cannot read upstream quota data.

needs_setup.label: Needs setup
needs_setup.description: Sign in again so GoClaw can restore the ChatGPT account workspace metadata.

retry_later.label: Retry later
retry_later.description: The quota endpoint is temporarily unavailable or rate limited.

unavailable.label: Unavailable
unavailable.description: Quota data is unavailable for this account right now.

healthy.title: Round robin looks healthy
healthy.description: {{observed}} ready accounts were observed rotating across {{count}} traced spans.

warning.title: Round robin is configured but not verified yet
warning.description: Only {{observed}} ready accounts have direct routing evidence across {{count}} traced spans so far.

manual.title: Ordered routing is active
manual.description: This agent is not rotating every request. Repeated use of the primary alias is expected until round robin is enabled.

identity.title: Identity
identity.displayNameHint: Friendly name shown in the UI. Leave empty to use the agent key.
identity.expertiseSummaryPlaceholder: e.g. Chiêm tinh, bói toán, tử vi, thần số học
identity.expertiseSummaryHint: Short description of this agent's expertise. Used for delegation discovery.

llmConfig.title: LLM Configuration
llmConfig.contextWindowHint: Token limit for the model context.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.workspacePathHint: Automatically assigned when the agent is created. Per-user subdirectories are created at runtime.
workspace.restrictToWorkspaceHint: Confine file access strictly within the workspace path.

files.readOnlyDesc: Only the agent owner can edit predefined context files.
files.resummonDesc: This will regenerate SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, and optionally USER_PREDEFINED.md from scratch using the original description. Any manual edits to these files will be overwritten.
files.openAgentDesc1: This is an open agent. Context files (AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, etc.) are personalized for each user. They are automatically created from templates when a user first chats with this agent.
files.openAgentDesc2pre: Agent-level files shown here are empty because open agents store all context per-user in the

fileEditor.editAiDescription: Describe what you want to change. AI will read the current files and update them accordingly.
fileEditor.editAiPlaceholder: e.g. Make the agent more formal, add Vietnamese language support, change the name to Luna...

shares.userIdPlaceholder: Search contacts or enter user ID...
shares.noSharesDesc: Share this agent with other users by entering their User ID above.
shares.revokeDesc: Revoke access for user "{{userId}}"? They will no longer be able to use this agent.
shares.roleDesc.user: Can use the agent and chat

links.teamsHint: Agent Links will be removed soon. Please use Agent Teams for multi-agent collaboration — it provides task tracking, shared workspace, and quality control in a simpler setup.
links.allowedUsersHint: If set, only these users can trigger this delegation. Comma-separated.
links.deniedUsersHint: These users are blocked from triggering this delegation. Comma-separated.
links.noLinksDesc: Create links to allow agents to delegate tasks to each other.
links.deleteDesc: Remove the delegation link to "{{name}}"? Agents will no longer be able to delegate to each other through this link.
links.allowedUsersHintShort: If set, only these users can trigger this delegation.
links.deniedUsersHintShort: These users are blocked from triggering this delegation.

skills.noSkillsDesc: Upload skills in the Skills page to grant them to agents.

instances.noInstancesDesc: Instances are created when users interact with this agent.
instances.selectInstance: Select an instance to view and edit its USER.md

summoning.title: Summoning Your Agent...
summoning.wait: This usually takes few minutes. Please wait...

configGroups.coreDesc: Essential settings that directly affect agent behavior

subagents.title: Subagents
subagents.description: Controls sub-agent spawning limits and behavior

toolPolicy.title: Tool Policy
toolPolicy.description: Control which tools this agent can use
toolPolicy.toolCallPrefixHint: Strips this prefix from model's tool call names before registry lookup.

workspaceSharing.title: Workspace Sharing
workspaceSharing.description: Control workspace file isolation between users
workspaceSharing.sharedDmTip: All DM users share the same workspace directory instead of isolated per-user folders
workspaceSharing.sharedGroupTip: All members in a group chat share the same workspace directory
workspaceSharing.sharedUsersTip: Specific user IDs that always share workspace regardless of DM/Group settings. Format: channel:userId (e.g. telegram:386246614)
workspaceSharing.warning: When sharing is enabled, all shared users can read and write files in the same workspace directory. Memory sharing is controlled separately. Context files remain isolated per user.
workspaceSharing.shareMemoryTip: All users access the same memory and knowledge graph. Independent of workspace folder sharing. When off, each user has their own isolated memory space.
workspaceSharing.shareMemoryNote: Toggling this does not migrate data — existing per-user memories become inaccessible in shared mode.

compaction.title: Compaction
compaction.description: Context window compaction and memory flush settings
compaction.maxHistoryShareTip: Maximum fraction of context window for conversation history (e.g. 0.85 = 85%). Compaction triggers when exceeded.
compaction.keepLastMessagesTip: Recent messages kept after compaction. Older messages are replaced by a summary.
compaction.memoryFlushTip: Before compaction, the agent gets a turn to save important context to memory files. Also triggers Knowledge Graph extraction.

contextPruning.title: Context Pruning
contextPruning.description: Trim old tool results to save context window
contextPruning.descriptionSimple: Automatically trims old tool results to prevent context overflow. Enabled by default.

sandbox.title: Sandbox
sandbox.description: Docker sandbox for code execution isolation

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Semantic memory search and embedding configuration
memory.enabledTip: Enable or disable the memory system for this agent.
memory.maxChunkLenTip: Maximum characters per memory chunk. Leave empty for system default.
memory.chunkOverlapTip: Overlap characters between chunks for context continuity. Leave empty for system default.
memory.maxResultsTip: Maximum memory entries returned per search query.
memory.minScoreTip: Minimum relevance score for search results.
memory.vectorWeightTip: Weight for semantic similarity in hybrid search.
memory.textWeightTip: Weight for keyword similarity in hybrid search.

thinking.title: Extended Thinking
thinking.description: Allow the model to reason before responding. Higher levels use more tokens but produce better results on complex tasks.

otherConfig.title: Other Config
otherConfig.description: Additional JSON config for advanced settings not covered by other sections

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat
heartbeat.notConfigured: No heartbeat schedule configured. Set one up to run this agent on autopilot.
heartbeat.enabledHint: When enabled, the agent runs on the configured interval.
heartbeat.ackMaxCharsHint: Max characters in the acknowledgement reply. 0 = no reply.
heartbeat.isolatedSessionHint: Run in a fresh session, not continuing the last conversation.
heartbeat.lightContextHint: Skip loading full context files to reduce token usage.
heartbeat.modelHint: Override provider/model for heartbeat runs. Leave empty to use agent defaults.
heartbeat.channelHint: e.g. telegram, feishu. Leave empty for no delivery.
heartbeat.checklistHint: Instructions injected into each heartbeat run. Supports markdown.
heartbeat.checklistPlaceholder:
# Heartbeat Checklist

- Check pending tasks
- Report status

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Control who can modify agent config and files. Owner always has full access.
permissions.noRules: No permission rules. Owner has implicit full access.

types.file_writer_desc: Controls who can edit files and manage cron in group chats. First user auto-added.
types.heartbeat_desc: Controls who can configure heartbeat schedule and settings via chat.
types.cron_desc: Controls who can create and manage scheduled cron jobs via chat.
types.context_files_desc: Controls who can modify agent identity files (SOUL.md, etc.) via chat.
types.all_desc: Full access to all configuration types.
